analysis.strategy: Lead with the relevancy/ranking angle — Ili has built ranking models at Yahoo (50% revenue increase) and LLM-powered search at JPMC (99% top-5 accuracy). Frame adtech heritage as native understanding of Yieldmo's business. Emphasize 0-to-1 and AI product leadership.

subtitles.jpmc: Agentic AI platform – LLM-powered search and ranking with 99% top-5 accuracy
subtitles.yahoo: Ranking, relevancy, and monetization infrastructure across 20B+ daily ad decisions
subtitles.newrelic: SaaS product integration and billing systems during hypergrowth

resumeData.summary: Sr. Director-level Product leader with 15+ years building AI-powered relevancy systems, ranking infrastructure, and advertiser products at scale. Currently leading agentic AI platform at JPMorgan Chase, delivering LLM-powered search and ranking with 99% top-5 accuracy across 45M+ documents for 7,000+ users. At Yahoo, rebuilt ranking models driving 50% revenue increase and $100M+ growth, with deep experience in real-time decisioning across 20B+ daily ad decisions. Proven track record in 0-to-1 product development, combining technical depth in AI/ML with strong product intuition for user experience and relevancy.
